question.label: Sharper feedback
question.name: Sharper feedback earlier — what stops you asking for it sooner?
question.description: Drills into the specific pattern he named to surface the driver behind delayed feedback-seeking.

answer: I have not built enough trust with adjacent teams yet.

assessment.note: He names a specific blocker to growth — insufficient trust with adjacent teams is preventing earlier feedback-seeking; this also points to a cross-team trust thread worth probing.
